EcoacousticUtilities 0.1.0
  • Reference

Package index

iNaturalist

Download sounds and images from iNaturalist

get_inat_sounds()
Download Sound Recordings from iNaturalist
get_inat_images()
Download Images from iNaturalist
get_inat_species_summary()
Get iNaturalist Species Summary by Sound Recording Counts
plot_inat_species_summary()
Plot iNaturalist Species Summary

Atlas of Living Australia

Download data from ALA

get_ala_sounds()
Download Sound Recordings from Atlas of Living Australia (ALA)
get_ala_circle_occurrences()
Download ALA Occurrences for a Taxon Within a Circular Area

Audio Utilities

Tools for managing and analyzing audio files

analyze_call_properties()
Analyze Call Properties: Frequency Range and Pulse Rate
convert_to_wav()
Convert audio files to WAV format
biggest_files()
Find the Largest Files in a Directory
find_duplicate_wavs()
Find Duplicate WAV Files by Content Hash
training_dataset_summary()
Summarize Audio Training Dataset
print(<training_dataset_summary>)
Print method for training_dataset_summary
